item.g:description: body { font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .content-box { margin-top: 1em; font-size: 1.2em; } h1.product-name { font-size: 1.6em; text-align: center; } .subHeader { font-size: 1.5em; background-color: #2a6fec; color: white; padding: 0.5em; margin-bottom: 0.5em; font-weight: bold; } .descriptionBody p { margin-top: 1em; } .descriptionValue { margin: 0; padding: 0; } span.gradeHeader { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; } h3 { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; margin-top: 1em; } #displayAppearance>ul { margin: 0; margin-bottom: 0.2em; } #displayAppearance p { margin: 0; } #displaySize>p { margin: 0; } div.icon { margin: 2em auto; } #linkUrl { text-align: center; } #displayGrade[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayAppearance[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayFunctional[title="none"] { display: none; } #displaySize[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayWeight[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayIncludings[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayFreeSpace[title="none"] { display: none; } .linkField[title="none"] { display: none; } #linkUrl[title="none"] { display: none; } Meter Works [Near MINT] Olympus 35 SP 35mm Film Camera 42mm f1.7 Lens from Japan #253 Description Discover the highly sought-after Olympus 35 SP, renowned for its excellent G.Zuiko 42mm f/1.7 lens and versatile spot/average metering system. This 35mm film camera is a fantastic choice for street photography and everyday shooting, offering superb image quality in a compact rangefinder package. Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item Overall, the camera shows minimal signs of use. There are some minor scuffs on the body. A slight dent is noted next to the film advance lever. Please check the provided photos for detailed condition of the product. Functional We have thoroughly tested this camera, and it works properly. Inspection Results: Operation Checks: Shutter: Operates correctly at all speeds. Self-timer: Functions as expected. Light meter: Tested and confirmed to be working properly, responsive to light changes. AF: Manual focus (rangefinder patch) is clear and accurate. Helicoid: Focus ring turns smoothly without stickiness or excessive play. Aperture: Blades are clean, oil-free, and stop down correctly. Optics (Lens - G.Zuiko 42mm f/1.7): Dirt: None. Dust: Slight internal dust, typical for a camera of this age, which will not affect image quality. Haze: None. Fungus: Slight fungus is present on internal lens elements. While minimal, this has been disclosed upfront. Scratch: None. Optics (Viewfinder): Dirt: None. Dust: None. Haze: Slight haze is present, which does not significantly impede viewing but is noted. Fungus: None. Scratch: None. Common Known Issues for the Olympus 35 SP (Based on Real-Time Data): Based on extensive real-time data from other listings for this specific model, we highlight common issues and our findings for this unit: Built-in Exposure Meter (HIGH priority): This model is known for potential accuracy or responsiveness issues, even if appearing functional. Our unit's meter was tested and works properly, showing responsiveness to light. However, for critical applications, users may wish to verify readings against a known light source across various conditions. Internal Lens/Viewfinder Fungus (HIGH priority): Fungus can be present and degrade image quality. Our inspection found slight fungus on the internal lens elements (as noted above). The viewfinder is free of fungus. Film Advance Mechanism (MEDIUM priority): Issues with the film pressure plate or spring tension can affect film flatness or smooth advance. While our functional tests confirm smooth film advance, we have noted a slight dent near the film advance lever on this unit, which is cosmetic and does not impact mechanism operation. Internal Lens Barrel Mechanics (MEDIUM priority): Dried lubricants, internal haze, or significant dust can affect lens operation. Our tests confirmed the helicoid and aperture mechanisms are operating smoothly, and internal haze is absent in the lens. Molded Base Plate Integrity (MEDIUM priority): The original base plate can be prone to damage or cracking. We inspected the body and found it structurally sound, though general scuffs are present. The slight dent near the film advance lever is also a body integrity note. Leatherette Peeling (LOW priority): The body's leatherette can peel. On this unit, the leatherette is securely attached, with no peeling observed. This camera is NOT recommended for: Pristine Collectors: This unit has slight internal lens fungus, slight dust, slight viewfinder haze, and a minor body dent/scuffs, making it unsuitable for those seeking a cosmetically or optically flawless collector's item. Users Demanding Absolute Meter Precision Without Verification: While tested and working, the model's known tendency for meter variations means critical users may want to perform their own extended calibration checks. Buyers Unwilling to Accept Minor Optical Imperfections: Th

We are pleased to offer the Canon Canonet QL17, a highly regarded 35mm rangefinder renowned for its sharp 45mm f/1.7 lens and robust build. This model is a favorite among film photography enthusiasts for its excellent image quality and intuitive handling. Grade: Excellent Appearance of the item Some scuffs on the body as depicted in the photos. Please examine all photos carefully for a detailed view of the product's cosmetic condition. Optics (Viewfinder) Please note there is moderate fungus in the viewfinder. This does not affect the image quality captured by the lens itself, but it may slightly impact the clarity of your viewing experience when composing shots. We encourage reviewing the detailed photos to assess this condition. Inspection Results Operation Checks Shutter: Operates correctly at all speeds. Self-timer: Functions as intended. Light Meter: Responsive and appears accurate (tested with new battery, not included). AF: Not applicable (Manual Focus Rangefinder). Helicoid: Smooth focusing action. Aperture: Blades open and close crisply. Film Advance/Rewind: Engages and operates smoothly during basic checks. Optics (Lens) Dirt: None Dust: Slight internal dust, typical for a vintage lens, does not affect image quality. Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None Known Issues for This Model & Our Assessment The Canon Canonet QL17 is a beloved vintage camera, but like all mechanical devices of its age, certain common issues can arise. We've conducted a thorough inspection based on these known points: Shutter Sluggishness/Failure: CHECKED & OK. Our tests confirm the shutter blades are operating correctly at all speeds. Light Meter Unresponsive/Inaccurate: CHECKED & OK. The built-in light meter is responsive and provides consistent readings. Lens Optics (Haze, Fungus): CHECKED & OK. The lens elements are clear, with only slight dust which is common for a vintage lens and does not impact performance. Cosmetic Wear: CHECKED & PRESENT. As noted, there are some scuffs on the body. IMPORTANT: Potential Gaps (Not Specifically Addressed or Tested Beyond Basic Function): General Maintenance (CLA Status): We have not performed a full Clean, Lubricate, and Adjust (CLA). While basic functions are working, internal mechanisms may have dried lubricants or accumulated grime that could require future service for optimal, long-term performance. Degraded Light Seals: We have not replaced the light seals. While not visibly deteriorated, film testing is the only way to confirm complete light-tightness. Battery Compartment Corrosion / Battery Door Integrity: We have confirmed the light meter works with a battery, but have not specifically inspected for hidden corrosion or issues with the battery door mechanism beyond its ability to hold a battery for testing. Film Advance/Rewind Issues: Basic film advance and rewind mechanisms functioned during our checks. However, subtle issues like occasional slippage or binding that can lead to overlapping/skipped frames were not exhaustively tested with film. Included Accessories Lens Cap No other accessories are included unless pictured or explicitly stated above. Who Is This Product NOT Recommended For? Collectors seeking a pristine, mint-condition camera: The body has scuffs, and the viewfinder has moderate fungus. Buyers requiring a fully CLA'd (Cleaned, Lubricated, Adjusted) camera: While functional, this camera has not undergone a complete professional service. Individuals sensitive to viewfinder imperfections: The moderate fungus in the viewfinder may be distracting for some users. Renowned for its exceptional sharpness, flat field, and superb contrast, this lens is a favorite among macro photographers and those seeking high-quality optics for various applications. It offers precise manual focus control and a fast f/2.8 aperture, making it versatile for close-up work, portraits, and general photography. This particular unit is offered in Excellent grade, ready to deliver outstanding results. Appearance of the item This lens exhibits minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age and use. You will notice some peeling paint and scuffs on the lens barrel. These are purely aesthetic and do not impact the lens's structural integrity or functional performance. Please examine the detailed photos carefully to assess its aesthetic condition. Optical System Condition We have meticulously inspected the optical elements. Internally, there is slight dust present, which is common in vintage lenses. Our testing confirms this does not affect image quality or resolution under typical shooting conditions. Crucially, there is no dirt, haze, fungus, scratches, or balsam separation on any of the lens elements, ensuring clear and sharp images. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. Comprehensive Inspection Results Functional Performance We have thoroughly tested this Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 lens, and it is confirmed to work properly across all functions. Helicoid (Manual Focus Ring): Operates smoothly and consistently throughout its entire range, allowing for precise focusing. No stiffness, binding, or play detected. Aperture Mechanism: Functions flawlessly. The aperture blades are clean, snappy, and free of oil residue, stopping down accurately to the selected setting. Important Information: Known Issues for This Model We believe in complete transparency. While this specific lens is in Excellent condition, the Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 is known for certain common issues due to its age and design. Body Integrity & Cosmetic Wear (Scuffs & General Model Weaknesses): This unit exhibits scuffs consistent with its age. Historically, the Trip 35's original molded base plate can be prone to damage or excessive wear, and cosmetic issues like leatherette peeling are also known. We encourage examining photos for the specific cosmetic condition of this item. Film Advance & Shutter Mechanism (Model Vulnerability): Though our unit's film advance and shutter mechanisms are operating properly, older cameras like the Trip 35 are known for potential issues such as film pressure plate adjustments, sticky shutter blades, or film advance lever failures. Perfect for everyday photography, it combines ease of use with excellent image quality, making it a favorite among film photography enthusiasts. This particular unit offers a fantastic opportunity to own a well-preserved example of this classic camera. Grade: Mint Appearance of the item The camera body is in beautiful condition, exhibiting minimal signs of use. Please refer to the detailed photographs for a complete visual assessment. Functional Status We conducted comprehensive tests and confirmed that all functions operate properly. The camera is fully functional and ready for use. Included Accessories None. The camera body is sold as-is without any additional accessories. Inspection Results Operational Checks: Shutter: OK - Fires accurately at all speeds. Self-timer: OK - Functions correctly. Light meter: OK - Responds accurately to light conditions. Flash: OK - Fires reliably. AF (Autofocus): OK - Achieves focus swiftly and precisely. Helicoid (Lens Extension): OK - Smooth operation for lens extension and retraction. Aperture: OK - Blades open and close smoothly. Optics (Lens): Dirt: None Dust: Slight - Minor internal dust, common in vintage lenses, does not affect image quality. Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None Optics (Viewfinder): Dirt: None Dust: None Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None Known Issues for This Model Based on our general knowledge, there are no widespread, commonly known inherent issues or defects specific to the Fujifilm Silvi F2.8 model. Please note that this analysis is based on general knowledge, as this specific model is not registered in our equipment-specific database. Not Recommended For: Individuals who require absolutely pristine, lab-clean internal optics, free from even the slightest particle of dust, though this minimal dust in the lens is visually insignificant and inconsequential for photography. Buyers seeking a camera with included accessories (e.g., case, strap, original box), as this listing is for the camera body only. item.g:title: [MINT] Nikon Ai-s Ais Nikkor 24mm F/2.8 MF Wide Angle Prime Lens Japan #314
item.g:description: body { font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .content-box { margin-top: 1em; font-size: 1.2em; } h1.product-name { font-size: 1.6em; text-align: center; } .subHeader { font-size: 1.5em; background-color: #2a6fec; color: white; padding: 0.5em; margin-bottom: 0.5em; font-weight: bold; } .descriptionBody p { margin-top: 1em; } .descriptionValue { margin: 0; padding: 0; } span.gradeHeader { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; } h3 { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; margin-top: 1em; } #displayAppearance>ul { margin: 0; margin-bottom: 0.2em; } #displayAppearance p { margin: 0; } #displaySize>p { margin: 0; } div.icon { margin: 2em auto; } #linkUrl { text-align: center; } #displayGrade[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayAppearance[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayFunctional[title="none"] { display: none; } #displaySize[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayWeight[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayIncludings[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayFreeSpace[title="none"] { display: none; } .linkField[title="none"] { display: none; } #linkUrl[title="none"] { display: none; } [MINT] Nikon Ai-s Ais Nikkor 24mm F/2.8 MF Wide Angle Prime Lens #314 Description This is a magnificent example of the Nikon Ai-s Ais Nikkor 24mm F/2.8, a highly regarded manual focus wide-angle prime lens. Known for its compact size, superb optical performance, and robust build, this lens is a favorite among enthusiasts for landscape, street, and architectural photography. Grade: Mint Appearance of the item The lens boasts a beautiful appearance, indicating extremely careful prior use. There are minimal to no visible signs of wear and tear, such as scuffs, scratches, or paint loss, maintaining an exceptionally clean aesthetic. Please examine the photos for detailed condition. Functional Status We have thoroughly tested this lens, and it operates perfectly. Detailed Inspection Results (Optical & Mechanical) Helicoid: Operates smoothly and precisely (rated OK), indicating excellent lubrication and no stiffness or binding. Aperture Blades: Fast and snappy, completely free of oil (rated OK), ensuring accurate exposures at all settings. Optics (Lens Elements): Thoroughly inspected with a bright light, the optical elements are pristine. Dirt/Dust: Absolutely none. Haze: Completely clear, with no internal cloudiness. Fungus: No traces of fungal growth. Scratches: None on the front, rear, or internal elements. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. Known Issues for This Model (Our Inspection Findings) As experts in vintage camera equipment, we are fully aware of common issues that can affect the Nikon Ai-s Nikkor 24mm F/2.8 lens. Our rigorous inspection confirms that this specific lens does NOT exhibit the following potential weaknesses often found in this model: Lens Scratches: Unlike some heavily used examples, the optical elements of this lens are entirely free of scratches. Focusing Mechanism Stiffness/Binding: The helicoid operates with perfect smoothness, showing no signs of dried grease or uneven resistance. Internal Dust/Debris: The optical path is remarkably clean, without significant dust or debris that could affect image quality. Haze/Fungus: We confirmed the absence of any internal haze or fungal growth, which are detrimental to contrast and sharpness. Oil on Aperture Blades: The aperture blades are clean and responsive, preventing exposure inaccuracies common with oily blades. Balsam Separation: We found no signs of element separation, a critical and often irreversible issue for older lenses. Significant Cosmetic Wear: While any used lens may show minor signs of handling, this item's "Beautiful" appearance indicates careful prior use, with minimal scuffs or paint loss. Included Accessories Front Lens Cap Rear Lens Cap Not Recommended For This lens is an outstanding example of a vintage manual focus prime, but it is NOT recommended for: Buyers expecting a brand-new, factory-sealed lens with modern autofocus capabilities and pristine, out-of-the-box condition. Users who prefer or require autofocus and are unwilling to manually focus to achieve precise image composition. Anyone seeking a lens for casual, rapid-fire photography where manual adjustments for focus and aperture are undesirable. Those who do not appreciate the unique character, robust mechanical build, and deliberate shooting experience offered by vintage manual optics. For U.S. Buyers - DDP (Duties Prepaid / Included) Import duty and standard courier fees are included in the price/shipping cost. This set includes the versatile M.ZUIKO DIGITAL 14-42mm lens and a dedicated flash unit, making it an excellent choice for photographers seeking portability and quality. This particular unit boasts a low shutter count and has been carefully inspected to ensure its operational integrity. Please read the detailed condition report below for a complete understanding of this camera. Condition & Grade Grade: Mint Appearance of the item The camera body is in beautiful condition overall, reflecting its 'Mint' grade. Weakness-First Disclosure: Please note that the rear monitor shows many visible scuffs and scratches. This is a cosmetic flaw and does not impede its functionality, but is clearly noted for transparency. Please refer to the photos for a detailed visual assessment of the product's condition. Functional Status Tested and confirmed to work properly. Inspection Results Operation Checks: Shutter: OK (Shutter count: 3890) Self-timer: OK Light meter: OK Flash: OK (Built-in pop-up flash and hot shoe confirmed functional) Autofocus (AF): OK Helicoid: OK Aperture: OK Optics (M.ZUIKO DIGITAL 14-42mm Lens): Dirt: None Dust: Slight (Minor internal dust, no impact on image quality) Haze: None Fungus: None Scratches: None Known Model-Specific Issues & Seller's Notes This section outlines common issues observed with the Olympus PEN Lite E-PL3 model, derived from a comprehensive database. While this specific unit has been tested and confirmed to be functional as described above, potential buyers should be aware of these model-specific risks: [CRITICAL] Main LCD Display Failure: This model is known for its main LCD screen failing to display images or information, preventing basic operation. Seller's Note: Our inspection confirmed this unit's LCD is functionally working, allowing for menu navigation and live view. However, please note the rear LCD has many cosmetic scuffs and scratches, as described in the Condition section. [CRITICAL] Shutter Mechanism Failure: Premature shutter failure, leading to incorrect exposures or complete jamming, is a known concern, even with low shutter counts. Seller's Note: The shutter mechanism on this unit passed all operational checks and has a low count of 3890. It is confirmed to be working properly. [MEDIUM] Built-in Flash/Hot Shoe Issues: Failures in the pop-up flash or hot shoe contacts are common. Seller's Note: The built-in flash on this unit was tested and works properly. [MEDIUM] Body Damage: Various components of the camera body (e.g., plastic trims, hot shoe) can be bent, cracked, or broken. Seller's Note: The camera body of this unit is in beautiful condition, with general signs of use consistent with its age. [MEDIUM] Controls Unresponsiveness: Physical buttons (e.g., shutter, menu) or command dials may become sticky, unresponsive, or exhibit erratic behavior. Seller's Note: All physical buttons and command dials on this unit were tested and operate correctly. [MEDIUM] Lens Optics Dust: Minor dust particles found inside the lens can occur. Seller's Note: Slight internal dust is present in the included 14-42mm lens, but it does not significantly impact image quality. [LOW] Connectivity Issues: External ports (e.g., USB, HDMI) may become non-functional. Seller's Note: All ports were briefly checked and appear to be functional. [LOW] General Cosmetic Wear: Surface imperfections such as scuffs, scratches, or paint loss. Seller's Note: Aside from the noted scuffs on the rear LCD, the camera exhibits typical minor cosmetic wear consistent with a Mint grade, as shown in photos. This classic combination offers superb image quality and creative control for film photography enthusiasts. We have thoroughly inspected and tested this unit to ensure its functionality and accurately represent its condition. Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item Some scuff on the body as shown in photos. Please check the photos for detailed cosmetic condition of the product. Functional Tested. Works properly. Please note there is a slight shutter squeal, a common characteristic for the Canon A-1. Our testing confirms this does not affect normal shooting performance or exposure accuracy. Optical System - Lens (FD 50mm f/1.4 S.S.C.) Dirt: None Dust: Slight (no impact on image quality) Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None Our thorough inspection confirmed the lens optics are in excellent condition, ensuring sharp and clear images. Optical System - Viewfinder Dirt: None Dust: None Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None The viewfinder is clear and bright, allowing for precise focusing and composition. Operation Checks Shutter: Functions correctly at all speeds. Self-timer: Works perfectly. Light meter: Accurate and responsive. Helicoid (Focusing): Smooth operation. Aperture: Blades are clean and operate smoothly. Model-Specific Known Issues & Our Findings We specifically evaluated this unit against common known issues for the Canon A-1 model: Shutter Mechanism ('Canon Squeal'): This unit exhibits a slight shutter squeal . This is a common symptom of dried lubricants in the mirror/shutter mechanism of the A-1. However, our comprehensive testing confirms that the shutter fires accurately at all speeds and this squeal does not impact photographic results. Cosmetic Condition: As noted above, there is a minor scuff on the camera body (please see photos). Viewfinder Display: The electronic viewfinder display for aperture and shutter speed information is fully functional and clear. Light Seals & Mirror Bumper: While not specifically replaced, our inspection found no immediate issues with light leaks or a sticky mirror bumper affecting current functionality. Please be aware that deterioration of foam seals is a common age-related issue for cameras of this vintage. Other Critical Issues: We found no evidence of general non-functionality, missing parts, power supply issues, electronic failure (camera powers on and responds correctly), or film advance problems. Included Accessories No accessories are included with this listing. Not Recommended For Collectors seeking a cosmetically flawless camera. Buyers who require absolute silence from the shutter mechanism. Anyone unfamiliar with manual focus or film photography. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Lens #186 Product Overview We are delighted to offer this classic Canon AE-1 Black 35mm SLR film camera paired with a bright FD 50mm f/1.4 S.S.C. lens. The AE-1 is renowned for its user-friendly automatic exposure, making it a beloved choice for both beginners and experienced film photographers. This particular unit, along with its powerful accessories, is ready to capture stunning analog images. Condition and Grade Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item Minor scuff marks are present on the body. Please check on the photos for detailed condition of the product. Functional All functions have been thoroughly tested and confirmed to be working properly. Optical system Lens: The lens exhibits slight internal haze and slight fungus. There is no dirt, dust, or scratches. Viewfinder: The viewfinder is clear with no dirt, dust, haze, fungus, or scratches. Inspection Results Operation Checks: Shutter: OK Self-timer: OK Light meter: OK AF (Focus): OK Helicoid (Focus Ring): OK Aperture: OK Optics: Lens: Slight haze, slight fungus. No dirt, dust, or scratches. Viewfinder: Clear. No dirt, dust, haze, fungus, or scratches. Known Issues for This Model Based on our extensive database for the Canon AE-1, here are common issues and how this specific unit addresses them: [CRITICAL] Shutter (Electronic Dependency): This model features a fully electronic shutter that requires a battery to function. We tested the camera with a battery and confirmed all shutter speeds operate correctly. It will not operate without power. [HIGH] Shutter Squeak: Dry-out of the mirror damper or aperture control bearing can cause a high-pitched squeal. We detected no such squeal during our tests, and shutter action was prompt without obstruction. [HIGH] Shutter Curtain Sticking: Dried lubricant can cause the shutter curtain to stick. We observed no instances of the shutter stopping half-open or failing to close completely during our tests. [HIGH] Meter/IC Failure: Common issues include the needle being stuck at F22, pinned to the bottom, no red lamp, or unresponsiveness to shutter speed changes. Our tests confirmed the light meter is fully functional and responsive to light and shutter speed changes. [HIGH] Light Seal Degradation: Foam degradation on light seals (back door, mirror box, viewfinder) is common. While not specifically replaced, our thorough functional tests did not indicate any light leaks, and the camera body closes securely. [MEDIUM] Film Advance Lever Issues: Problems such as accidental shutter firing at the end of the stroke or a sticking shutter lock button are known. We found the film advance lever and shutter lock button to operate smoothly and correctly without issue. Included Accessories POWER WINDER A DATA BACK A Not Recommended For This product may not be ideal for: Buyers seeking a cosmetically flawless camera, due to the minor scuff marks on the body. Collectors or perfectionists who require lenses completely free of any internal haze or fungus. Individuals who prefer fully mechanical cameras that operate without a battery, as the AE-1 has an electronic shutter. Buyers expecting brand-new light seals, as common degradation for this model's age means original seals may not be pristine. item.g:title: [Near MINT] Canon IXY 650 Black PowerShot ELPH 360 HS Digital Camera Japan #194
item.g:description: [Near MINT] Canon IXY 650 Black PowerShot ELPH 360 HS Compact Digital Camera Japan #194 Overview Discover the Canon IXY 650 Black PowerShot ELPH 360 HS, a compact digital camera in Near Mint condition. This versatile camera is perfect for everyday photography, offering reliable performance and excellent image quality. Condition Overall Grade: Near Mint This camera presents in excellent condition, reflecting meticulous care. While "Near Mint" implies minor imperfections may exist upon very close inspection, we rate its appearance as beautiful. There are no significant dents, deep scratches, or heavy cosmetic wear. Please refer to the high-resolution images for the most accurate representation of its cosmetic state. Inspection Results Operation Checks Shutter: We tested the shutter mechanism. It fires accurately and consistently. â Self-Timer: The self-timer functions perfectly, initiating and completing the countdown as expected. â Light meter: We confirmed the light meter is accurate, providing correct exposure readings. â Flash: The built-in flash operates reliably, firing consistently and providing appropriate illumination. â AF: Autofocus (AF) is quick and precise, locking onto subjects without hesitation. â Helicoid: The lens helicoid operates smoothly throughout the zoom range, with no stiffness or grinding. â Aperture: The aperture blades open and close cleanly, without oil or sluggishness. â Optics Lens: We inspected the lens elements thoroughly. They are clean and clear with no dirt, haze, fungus, or scratches. We noted only slight internal dust, which is typical for a used lens and will not affect image quality. â Each item was individually inspected and tested by our team. Known Issues for This Model Based on our experience with this model, we specifically check for these common issues: LCD Display Bleed/Failure (Top Plate): This known issue refers to a small LCD display on the top plate. The Canon IXY 650 (ELPH 360 HS) model does not feature such a display. The main rear LCD on this unit is confirmed clear and fully functional. â Electronics/Power Failure: Critical issues like the camera not powering on or shutting down intermittently. We have thoroughly tested this unit, and it powers on consistently and operates without interruption. â Cosmetic Wear: Common low-level cosmetic signs of use. While graded 'Near Mint', we ensured there are no significant dents, deep scratches, or peeling parts on the camera body. Minor, superficial signs of use consistent with age may be present but do not detract from its beautiful appearance. â Optics Dust: Minor dust particles found inside the lens. We confirm only slight internal dust in this unit's lens, which is well within acceptable limits and does not impact image quality. â Included Accessories Battery â Charger â Original Box â Not Recommended For Collectors seeking absolutely flawless, factory-new items, as 'Near Mint' implies minor handling marks consistent with age. Those who require a camera with absolutely zero internal dust, as this unit has slight, non-affecting particles. Buyers who do not examine product photos carefully, as all cosmetic details are represented there. For U.S. Buyers â DDP (Duties Prepaid / Included) All applicable import duties and standard courier fees are already included in the item price and/or shipping cost. No additional payment is required at the time of delivery. Estimated delivery time is as shown in the listing. In the unlikely event of unexpected charges, please contact us before making any payment. Buy with confidence â all import-related charges are covered on our end under DDP terms. Important Notice for Buyers Outside the U.S. This item ships from Japan. Import duties, taxes (such as VAT or GST), and related charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These are the buyer's responsibility. We recommend checking with your local customs office for estimated charges before placing your order. In most cases, these fees are collected by the carrier at the time of delivery. All customs declarations are completed accurately. We do not undervalue items or mark shipments as gifts.

item.g:title: [Near MINT] Canon New FD NFD 35-105mm f/3.5 Macro Zoom MF Lens from Japan #242
item.g:description: body { font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .content-box { margin-top: 1em; font-size: 1.2em; } h1.product-name { font-size: 1.6em; text-align: center; } .subHeader { font-size: 1.5em; background-color: #2a6fec; color: white; padding: 0.5em; margin-bottom: 0.5em; font-weight: bold; } .descriptionBody p { margin-top: 1em; } .descriptionValue { margin: 0; padding: 0; } span.gradeHeader { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; } h3 { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; margin-top: 1em; } #displayAppearance>ul { margin: 0; margin-bottom: 0.2em; } #displayAppearance p { margin: 0; } #displaySize>p { margin: 0; } div.icon { margin: 2em auto; } #linkUrl { text-align: center; } #displayGrade[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayAppearance[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayFunctional[title="none"] { display: none; } #displaySize[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayWeight[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayIncludings[title="none"] { display: none; } #displayFreeSpace[title="none"] { display: none; } .linkField[title="none"] { display: none; } #linkUrl[title="none"] { display: none; } [Near MINT] Canon New FD NFD 35-105mm f/3.5 Macro Zoom MF Lens from Japan #242 Description Overview Discover the versatility of the Canon New FD NFD 35-105mm f/3.5 Macro Zoom MF Lens, an excellent choice for photographers seeking a robust manual focus zoom with macro capabilities. This lens offers a bright constant aperture of f/3.5 across its zoom range, making it suitable for various shooting conditions from wide-angle landscapes to detailed close-ups. Its classic FD mount makes it a perfect companion for Canon FD-mount SLR cameras or adapt it to modern mirrorless systems. Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item The exterior shows minor scuffs, as detailed in the photos. Please check the photos for a detailed visual condition of the product. Functional Status We have thoroughly tested this lens. It is fully functional and works properly. Inspection Results: Detailed Breakdown Operation Checks: Helicoid: Smooth and precise operation throughout the entire focus range. Aperture: Blades are clean, snappy, and free of oil. They actuate crisply at all f-stops. Optics (Lens Elements): Dirt: None. Dust: Slight internal dust, typical for a vintage lens, with no discernible impact on image quality. Haze: None. Fungus: None. Scratches: None on front, rear, or internal elements. Separation: No signs of optical element separation. Coatings: Anti-reflective coatings appear intact with no significant wear or deterioration. Optics (Viewfinder): Dirt: None. Dust: None. Haze: Moderate internal haze is present. While visible, it does not affect the actual image quality captured by the lens. Fungus: None. Scratches: None. Known Common Issues for This Model & Our Findings We've checked against common issues for the Canon New FD NFD 35-105mm lens: Focus Ring Stiff/Loose: Our Finding: The helicoid operates smoothly and precisely, confirming no issues. Lens Scratches: Our Finding: No scratches were found on any lens elements. Lens Separation: Our Finding: No signs of optical element separation detected. Lens Coating Wear: Our Finding: Coatings are in good condition with no significant wear. Internal Lens Haze: Our Finding: No haze was detected within the lens elements. Cosmetic Damage: Our Finding: Minor scuffs are present on the exterior, as detailed in the "Appearance" section. Internal Lens Optics (Haze/Dust/Fungus): Our Finding: Slight internal dust is present, but no haze or fungus. Optical clarity is excellent. Viewfinder Dust/Haze/Debris: Our Finding: Moderate internal haze is present in the viewfinder, as detailed above. Note: For lenses, this typically refers to associated external viewfinders or an observation from a combined camera/lens inspection. Aperture Blades Oily/Sticky: Our Finding: Aperture blades are clean and operate smoothly and responsively. Lens Fungus Growth: Our Finding: No fungus detected on or between lens elements. Internal Lens Mechanics: Our Finding: Both focusing helicoid and aperture mechanism operate smoothly, indicating healthy internal components. Internal Lens Dust: Our Finding: Slight internal dust is present, but it has no visible impact on image quality. Included Accessories Lens Cap Everything shown in the photos is included. Renowned for its exceptional optical quality and compact design, this manual focus lens is a superb choice for landscape, street photography, and architecture. Its wide 24mm focal length and bright f/2.8 aperture allow for creative shooting in various conditions, delivering sharp images with beautiful contrast and color. A classic optic for Nikon film cameras and adaptable to modern digital bodies. Condition and Grade Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item Slight scuff on the exterior barrel. Please check the photos for detailed condition of the product. Overall, the lens presents beautifully for its age. Functional This lens has been thoroughly tested by our technicians and is confirmed to be in excellent working order. All mechanical and optical functions operate properly. Detailed Inspection Results Operation Checks AF (Focus Confirmation Compatibility): OK. Confirms proper electronic communication for in-camera focus confirmation with compatible Nikon bodies, as expected for an Ai-s lens. Helicoid: OK. The focus helicoid turns smoothly and evenly throughout its range, allowing for accurate focusing. Aperture: OK. Aperture blades open and close snappily and correctly, providing accurate exposure control. Optics (Lens Elements) Dirt: None. Dust: Slight internal dust, typical for a vintage lens. This does not affect image quality. Haze: None. The optical elements are clear. Fungus: None. Scratch: None on front, rear, or internal elements. Other: A very slight oil stain is present on the aperture blades. IMPORTANT: Our tests confirm this stain currently does not impede the smooth opening/closing of the blades, nor does it affect exposure accuracy. We disclose this transparently as a known issue that can sometimes worsen over very long-term use. Known Issues for This Model (Our Findings) Based on common issues for the Nikon Ai-s Nikkor 24mm F2.8 and our specific inspection, here are our findings: Cosmetic Wear: Visible signs of use such as scuffs, scratches, or paint loss. (Our finding: Minor scuff on exterior, otherwise good). Lens Scratches: Scratches on optical elements. (Our finding: None). Focus Mechanism (Helicoid): Stiff, difficult, or uneven focus ring. (Our finding: Operates smoothly, "OK"). Lens Internal Debris/Dust: Presence of small dust particles. (Our finding: Slight internal dust, common and not impacting image quality). Lens Haze: Milky or cloudy internal haze. (Our finding: None). Lens Fungus: Fungal growth inside lens elements. (Our finding: None). Aperture Blades: Oil residue on blades causing slow/sticky operation. (Our finding: Very slight oil stain present, but functionally "OK" and not affecting operation). Balsam Separation: Separation of cemented lens elements. (Our finding: None observed). Accessories: Front cap included only. No rear cap is provided. Included Accessories Front Lens Cap Only (No Rear Cap) This Product Is NOT Recommended For: Buyers seeking a cosmetically flawless, brand-new lens with absolutely no signs of use. Users who require a lens guaranteed to be absolutely free of any microscopic internal dust, which is common in vintage optics. Collectors demanding optics or externals without any visible cosmetic imperfections, even minor ones like the disclosed scuff. Those who are unwilling to accept the disclosed very slight oil stain on aperture blades, despite its current functional integrity and no impact on performance. This manual focus lens is a favorite among macro enthusiasts and provides stunning detail and contrast, ideal for close-up photography and general use. Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item Minor scuffs on the lens barrel, consistent with 'Near Mint' grade. Please refer to the detailed photos for a comprehensive view of the cosmetic condition. Functional Status Tested and confirmed to be fully operational. The focus ring turns smoothly and precisely, and the aperture blades actuate responsively, albeit with a slight oil stain. Our Detailed Inspection Results Focus Mechanism: The manual focus ring operates smoothly and consistently throughout its entire range, allowing for precise adjustments without stiffness or binding. Aperture Blades: Blades are snappy, move freely, and close completely without stickiness or delay, despite a slight, non-impacting oil stain on some blades. Lens Mount: Secure and in excellent condition, ensuring a firm attachment to compatible Nikon F-mount camera bodies. Optics: Dust: Slight internal dust is present, a common characteristic in vintage lenses and confirmed to have no visible impact on image quality. Dirt/Debris: None. Haze: None detected, optics are clear. Fungus: No fungal growth observed on any lens elements. Scratches: No scratches are present on the front, rear, or internal optical elements. Balsam Separation: No signs of balsam separation were observed within the cemented elements. Model-Specific Considerations (Common Issues Addressed) As experts in camera and lens sales, we proactively inspect for known common issues specific to the Nikon Ai-S Micro Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 lens model. Here's our assessment: Cosmetic Wear: Minor scuffs are noted on the lens barrel, consistent with the 'Near Mint' grade and light previous use. No heavy paint loss, dings, or significant grime accumulation was found. Aperture Blade Oil Residue: A slight oil stain is confirmed on some aperture blades. Crucially, our tests verify that this does NOT cause slow, sticky, or incomplete aperture closure, and exposure accuracy is unaffected. Internal Lens Debris (Dust): A slight amount of internal dust is present. This is typical for the model and era and is minor enough not to cause flare, reduce contrast, or appear in images. Focus Mechanism (Stiffness): The focus ring operates with consistent, smooth resistance. No excessive stiffness, binding, or inconsistent resistance was detected, indicating healthy lubrication. Lens Haze & Fungus: We confirm the absence of internal haze (milky cloudiness) or fungal growth, which are critical issues for optical performance in this model. Lens Scratches: No scratches were found on any optical elements. Balsam Separation: We found no evidence of this critical issue, which would severely degrade image quality. Accessory Cosmetics: The included lens cap shows minor cosmetic wear. Included Accessories Lens Cap (Front) Only the items pictured and listed above are included in this sale. This Product Is Not For Buyers seeking a lens that is absolutely free of any internal dust, as a slight amount is present. Collectors demanding cosmetically pristine or factory-new condition, due to minor scuffs and accessory wear. Photographers who prefer or require auto-focus functionality, as this is a manual focus lens. Users who are uncomfortable with the presence of a non-functional oil stain on aperture blades. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. LCD: The rear LCD display is bright and clear, with no signs of 'bleed', dead pixels, or functional failure. Autofocus: The autofocus system is smooth, fast, and accurately locks onto subjects. Body Integrity: Beyond the noted scuff, the camera body is intact with no bent, cracked, or broken components, and all plastic trims and coverings are securely attached. Known Issues for This Model (Addressed) We are aware of common issues that can affect Olympus OM-D E-M10 cameras. For this specific unit, we have specifically checked for the following: Body Damage: While a minor scuff is present (as detailed above), we confirmed there are no bent, cracked, or broken components like hot shoes or trims. Viewfinder Issues: We verified the viewfinder is free from internal dust, haze, debris, or peeling coatings, ensuring a clear view. Light Meter Failure: We confirmed the light meter is fully functional and provides correct readings. LCD Bleed/Failure: The LCD display on this unit is perfectly clear, with no 'bleed' or complete failure. Autofocus Problems: We extensively tested the autofocus system, and it performs smoothly and accurately. Flash Issues: The built-in flash on this camera fires reliably and consistently. Body Covering/Light Seals: The exterior covering is securely attached with no peeling or degradation. (Note: Issues like "Film Advance" and "Lens Haze" are not applicable to a digital body-only listing or have been confirmed absent.) Helicoid (Lens Zoom/Focus Mechanism): Operates smoothly. Aperture: Opens and closes without issue. Optical System Inspection We carefully inspected the lens optics and found: Dirt: Slight internal dirt present. Dust: None. Haze: None. Fungus: None. Scratches: None. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. Known Issues for Sony Cyber-shot DSC-WX350 Model While this particular unit performs excellently, we believe in transparency. Based on our extensive database, here are common issues known for the DSC-WX350 model, along with our findings for this specific camera: Cosmetic Damage/Wear (e.g., dents, scratches, scuffs, paint loss): This unit exhibits a minor scuff (as disclosed above). No other significant cosmetic damage, dents, or paint loss were observed, aligning with its 'Near Mint' grade. Optics Dust/Internal Dirt: Our inspection found slight internal dirt (not dust) in the lens, which does not affect image quality. This unit is free from significant dust, haze, fungus, or scratches. General Functionality/Electronics/Power Failure (e.g., non-functional, won't power on, unresponsive controls): This unit powers on, functions normally, and has passed all operational checks without any issues related to electronics, power, or general functionality. No corroded battery contacts were found. Controls (sticky/unresponsive buttons/dials): All physical buttons (shutter, menu, zoom) and command dials are fully responsive and operate smoothly without stickiness or erratic behavior.
